heroKicker: Ship copy like you ship features.
heroLede: Same JSON shape as dcx-client-app—prove the GitHub → Lokalise → runtime loop here before you touch prod.
cardPipelineCaption: If it fits on a napkin, your translators can reason about it. If it does not, fix the product first.
cardFiltersHint: Every line below is a real key. Edit JSON, let Lokalise pull, refresh—watch the DOM obey.
cardErrorHint: Config errors should sound human in every language—not like cold leftovers from another era.
footerLine: Darwin CX · Built to fail safely in staging, not in your sprint demo.
pageDashboardLede: Stat-style labels from the dashboard namespace—no live data.
pageMarketingLede: Subset of marketing keys synced from Darwin for this POC.
pageCustomerCareLede: Subset of customer care copy for search and subscription patterns.
pageReportingLede: Reporting labels for a read-only demo surface.
pageAdminLede: Admin form labels pulled from Darwin strings.
pageSettingsLede: Manage your account preferences, notification channels, and display options.

settings.hintNotifications: Choose how and when you want to be notified about campaign updates and system events.
settings.hintDeleteAccount: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
settings.toastSaved: Your settings have been saved successfully.
settings.toastReset: Settings have been reset to their default values.
